bullets.text: Designed and delivered production-ready AI/ML solutions using langchain, python, rag.
Built scalable APIs and workflows using langchain, python, rag to support real-world deployments.
Implemented MLOps practices for reproducibility and tracking using langchain, python, rag.

cover_letter.subject: Application for the role
paragraphs: Hello Hiring Team, I’m applying for the role. My background aligns strongly with the role’s needs, particularly in langchain, python, rag.
I focus on building production-grade systems: clean APIs, reliable pipelines, and measurable outcomes. I value traceability, safety, and governance in AI delivery.
If helpful, I can share examples of end-to-end work covering design, implementation, testing, and deployment. Thank you for your time and consideration.

qa_stubs.Why are you a fit for this role?: My experience in langchain, python, rag matches the role requirements, and I build production-ready systems with strong engineering discipline.
